item.title: Three Interesting Pipes from the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores three pipes found on the Thames foreshore and considers their history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Three Interesting Pipes from the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores three pipes found on the Thames foreshore and considers their history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Discovering a 1700s Onion Bottle
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a beautiful onion bottle from the 1700s, sharing its history and significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Discovering a 1700s Onion Bottle
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and uncovers a beautiful onion bottle from the 1700s, sharing its history and significance. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Hidden Gem from the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores a find preserved in the Thames mud for over 100 years, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: A Hidden Gem from the Thames Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores a find preserved in the Thames mud for over 100 years, uncovering its history and the story it may tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Unexpected Treasure on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a small find with a story to tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Unexpected Treasure on the Thames Foreshore
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares a small find with a story to tell. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Finding Artefacts and Their Lost Stories
item.description: Exploring Thames foreshore finds and the stories they reveal from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Finding Artefacts and Their Lost Stories
media:content.media:description: Exploring Thames foreshore finds and the stories they reveal from the past. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Exploring Bottle Dumps Near Manchester
item.description: Nicola White explores bottle dumps near Manchester, uncovering traces of everyday history through discarded glass and objects. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Exploring Bottle Dumps Near Manchester
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores bottle dumps near Manchester, uncovering traces of everyday history through discarded glass and objects. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: Is This a Doll? Thames Foreshore Find
item.description: A Thames mudlark explores a curious find and considers its history on the foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: Is This a Doll? Thames Foreshore Find
media:content.media:description: A Thames mudlark explores a curious find and considers its history on the foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: Beautiful Fragments of London History
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, uncovering fragments of London’s past and sharing the stories they reveal. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: Beautiful Fragments of London History
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore, uncovering fragments of London’s past and sharing the stories they reveal. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: London Mudlarking: A Thames Discovery
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and reflects on a historic find from London’s liquid history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

media:content.media:title: London Mudlarking: A Thames Discovery
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and reflects on a historic find from London’s liquid history. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Stunning Bottle from the Thames
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a striking bottle find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

media:content.media:title: A Stunning Bottle from the Thames
media:content.media:description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a striking bottle find. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
